personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Capacity Planning & AI-Driven Infrastructure Optimization
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Data Engineer with over 20 years of enterprise experience, specializing in AWS architecture, Generative AI systems, and software engineering. Proficient in designing and implementing production GenAI solutions, including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines and agent workflows using AWS Bedrock. Expert in building scalable data platforms and MLOps practices for regulated environments. Adept at navigating ambiguity to deliver impactful, compliance-focused solutions. Passionate about contributing to Slalom’s mission of driving innovation through cutting-edge GenAI compliance engines. Eager to leverage deep expertise in AWS and GenAI to architect transformative solutions in Dallas, TX.

flagship_projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
flagship_projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python, Claude Code, and Grok (xAI). System orchestrates 10+ automated steps: semantic duplicate detection (FAISS vector embeddings), LLM-powered job scoring, resume/cover letter generation, and application tracking. Implemented multi-step agentic workflows with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) techniques for semantic similarity matching across 100+ job postings.
highlights: Designed 10-step agentic orchestration pipeline with scoring and quality gating
Implemented RAG-style semantic duplicate detection using FAISS vector embeddings
Integrated Grok-3 LLM API for job scoring and resume tailoring
Built quality gate to prevent bad output from reaching submission
Used Claude Code for AI-accelerated development

flagship_projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
flagship_projects.description: Replaced legacy manual forecasting with an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python and PySpark. Reduced forecasting cycles by 90% with Prophet and scikit-learn models predicting bottlenecks 6 months ahead. Created interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights.
highlights: Replaced manual forecasting — cut cycles by 90%
Prophet + scikit-learn models predicting bottlenecks 6 months ahead
Interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed a full serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock. Built Text-to-SQL GenAI agent with Claude 3 Sonnet for query generation. Resolved small file problem using Snappy and Parquet compression for enterprise-scale ETL optimization.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Data mined user performance metrics to optimize critical money-generating systems using Dynatrace. Provided actionable insights for system enhancements.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer

Collaborated on rightsizing resources based on data-driven projections in a regulated banking environment.
